auth_notes: Requires a Google Cloud Console project with the Google Sheets API and Google Drive API enabled. Users must configure OAuth2 credentials or use a Service Account JSON key for server-to-server communication.
rate_limits: 300 requests per minute per project; 60 requests per minute per user per project. Limits are shared across all spreadsheets accessed by the same credentials.
gotchas: The 'Google Sheets Trigger' node in n8n uses polling, not real-time webhooks, which can lead to delays or missed updates if the polling interval is too long.
Data types are often coerced; for example, numbers formatted as strings in the sheet may cause issues when performing calculations in subsequent n8n nodes.
Accessing files on a Google Shared Drive requires the 'Drive API' to be enabled in the Google Cloud Console in addition to the Sheets API.
client_must_provide: OAuth2 Client ID and Client Secret
Target Spreadsheet ID (found in the URL)
research_notes: While 'Spreadsheets' is a category, the primary n8n implementation refers to Google Sheets. Users requiring Excel must use the 'Microsoft Excel' node which uses the Microsoft Graph API. Webhook-like behavior in Google Sheets usually requires a custom Google Apps Script to send an HTTP request to an n8n Webhook node.

effort_recommendation.rationale: While 'Spreadsheets' is a category, the primary n8n implementation refers to Google Sheets. Users requiring Excel must use the 'Microsoft Excel' node which uses the Microsoft Graph API. Webhook-like behavior in Google Sheets usually requires a custom Google Apps Script to send an HTTP request to an n8n Webhook node.
